files.description: Add two new DELETE endpoints: DELETE /agents/task/{task_id} to delete a single task, and DELETE /agents/tasks to delete all tasks. Both require admin auth. Call task_manager.delete_task() or task_manager.delete_all_tasks() functions.

Add two new functions: delete_task(task_id) to delete a single task from the database, and delete_all_tasks() to clear all tasks. Both should also clean up associated sandbox directories and any running processes.

Add a clear button next to each task in the task list that calls DELETE /agents/task/{task_id}. Add a 'Clear All Tasks' button at the top with confirmation dialog. Both should refresh the task list after successful deletion. Handle loading and error states.
